title: Enhanced Brewery
description: A simple mod that adds potions for effects without potion counterpart
body:
**This is my first EVER mod**

This is a super simple mod that adds potions for these effects:
- Absorption
- Blindness
- Conduit Power
- Dolphin's Grace
- Glowing
- Haste
- Hunger
- Mining Fatigue
- Resistance
- Saturation
- Wither

## Recipes
### Absorption:
Brewed by adding a golden apple into an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a golden apple into an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b4e1ff0bc6224096a4c0748e28b0818caed9ca.png)
### Blindness:
Brewed by adding an inc sac into a night vision potion

![Brewed by adding an inc sac into a night vision potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3606770b93bb84f9d05d74ab5e19781bd7cfbc0.png)
### Conduit Power:
Brewed by adding a heart of the sea into an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a heart of the sea into an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b288a4d83b94c8f583229165f52fb5f4203ce17c.png)
### Dolphin's Grace:
Brewed by adding a tropical fish into a swiftness potion

![Brewed by adding a tropical fish into a swiftness potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4ec3b633e3a7e6166952824686e5e719acfb82d.png)
### Glowing:
Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into an invisibility potion

![Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into an invisibility potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c4d9a1ea38f0ea716add8ad050f1f56efbb6cd4.png)
### Haste:
Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into a mining fatigue potion

![Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into a mining fatigue potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fce1bc97614703d871499e40ee547142328e4d8.png)
### Hunger:
Brewed by adding a poisonous potato into an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a poisonous potato into an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c16ab209898490d60a3429aca8757b97fc6f68df.png)
### Mining Fatigue:
Brewed by adding a prismarine shard into an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a prismarine shard into an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ecb090f36c6aa4fab91d0826c2b40ebb781f79d.png)
### Resistance:
Brewed by adding a blaze rod to an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a blaze rod to an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/267a7e84540977e76d46cb6e04b45ad82e56a03a.png)
### Saturation:
Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into a hunger potion

![Brewed by adding a fermented spider eye into a hunger potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c35f61677983dd359b057bf9d77d09cf04a6f6c3.png)
### Wither:
Brewed by adding a wither rose into an awkward potion

![Brewed by adding a wither rose into an awkward potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92dc6320a98fac246e312a385f90333ccd5b4c5b.png)
## Plans for future updates
- I want to add a golden mushroom item that is used to make health boost potions
- I want to add more customizablity and config to the mod
- I want to add some more potion brewing changes such as potions in cauldrons like in Bedrock Edition*

*I currently am very new to modding, so the likelyhood of more complex features such as that coming out soon are very small
## FAQ
**Q: Will you port this to older versions?**

A: No.

**Q: Will you ever make a Forge/Neoforge port of this mod?**

A: I might at some point, not sure though
